commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a channel-neutral execution-activity typing signaler, forwards selected embedded and CLI harness phases into it, updates typing-mode tests and docs, and allowlists the existing SQLite user_version helper in the Kysely guardrail script.

PR surface: Source +34, Tests +108, Docs +1, Other +1. Total +144 across 6 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main has no execution-phase typing bridge, and `message` mode suppresses tool-start typing until renderable text. I did not run a live Telegram reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The PR has no narrow repair task, but the protected maintainer label, stale base, and visible default typing behavior change make this a maintainer landing decision.
